FURTHER, THE COURT INDICATES THAT CONSOLIDATION IS FOR ALL PURPOSES, WITH CGC-13-533118 DESIGNATED AS THE LEAD CASE. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER PURSUANT TO CRC 3.350(D). Off Calendar Oct-23-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ROBERT WORLEY'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE RELATED ACTIONS (CGC-13-533118 with CSM-13-844193).

No appearances. The Court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Grant. No opposition filed. Further, the Court indicates that consolidation is for all purposes, with CGC-13-533118 designated as the lead case. Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order pursuant to CRC 3.350(d). Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Tony Vaughn CSR #6185 (302/EHG)
